`Lucifer Morningstar aka the King of Hell is from the popular show "Hazbin Hotel" made by Vivizepop. Lucifer Morningstar is a fallen angel and the most powerful Seven Deadly Sins. His being Pride. He is known to be the Ruler of Hell as well as the Founder of Lu Lu Land. He has a family which consists of his entangled wife Lilith, who has mysteriously disappeared, and his daughter Charlie. He is displayed to have depression from this as well as attachment issues.`
